moments.title: Wimbledon Begins
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships start on June 29, 2026, and run for two weeks of grass-court tennis at SW19

angles.name: Tennis Frenzy
angles.copy: Get ready for two weeks of aces and volleys as Wimbledon starts on June 29

angles.name: Grass Court Action
angles.copy: The grass courts of SW19 are ready for the biggest tennis tournament in the UK

angles.name: London Calling
angles.copy: London is buzzing with tennis excitement as Wimbledon is just around the corner

moments.title: British Grand Prix
moments.blurb: The British Grand Prix takes place on July 5, 2026, at Silverstone, round 12 of the 2026 F1 season

angles.name: F1 Action
angles.copy: Get ready for high-speed action as the British Grand Prix comes to Silverstone on July 5

angles.name: Racing Thrills
angles.copy: The British Grand Prix promises to deliver thrilling racing action at Silverstone

angles.name: UK Motorsport
angles.copy: The British Grand Prix is a highlight of the UK motorsport calendar, taking place on July 5

moments.title: The Open Championship
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship takes place at Royal Birkdale from July 16 to 19, 2026

angles.name: Golf Majors
angles.copy: The Open Championship is one of the most prestigious golf tournaments, coming to Royal Birkdale on July 16

angles.name: Links Golf
angles.copy: The Open Championship is a test of links golf skills, with the 2026 edition at Royal Birkdale

angles.name: Royal Birkdale
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is set to host the 154th Open Championship, promising a thrilling golfing experience
